name: Gekisou Sentai Carranger
original_name: 激走戦隊カーレンジャー
overview: After the Bowzock, a ruthless — not to mention reckless — gang of interstellar biker thugs, destroy his home planet of Hazard, Dappu visits Earth where he discovers five humans with the ability to harness "Carmagic." With this power, these five heroes can defeat the Bowzock before the band of witless bikers is able to add Earth to its list of wrecked worlds.

trailers.title: Opening | Racing Squadron Carranger - Naritaka Takayama [Subtitled]
